questions.question: What is the definition of a variable in algebra?
options: A symbol used to represent a number
A constant value in a mathematical expression
questions.correct_answer: A symbol used to represent a number

questions.question: What is the value of sin(30 degrees) in trigonometry?
What is the definition of a limit in calculus?
options: A value that a function approaches as the input values get arbitrarily close to a certain point
A specific point on the graph of a function
questions.correct_answer: A value that a function approaches as the input values get arbitrarily close to a certain point

questions.question: What is the formula for the area of a circle?
What is the value of x in the equation 2x + 5 = 11?
What is the definition of sine in trigonometry?
options: The ratio of the opposite side to the hypotenuse in a right triangle
The ratio of the adjacent side to the hypotenuse in a right triangle
The ratio of the hypotenuse to the opposite side in a right triangle
The ratio of the hypotenuse to the adjacent side in a right triangle
questions.correct_answer: The ratio of the opposite side to the hypotenuse in a right triangle

questions.question: What is the formula for the derivative of x^2?
What is the value of y in the equation y - 3 = 7?
What is the definition of a function in algebra?
options: A relation between a set of inputs and a set of possible outputs
A specific type of geometric shape
questions.correct_answer: A relation between a set of inputs and a set of possible outputs

questions.question: What is the value of cos(60 degrees) in trigonometry?
In a right-angled triangle, the length of the hypotenuse is 10 cm and one of the other sides is 6 cm. What is the length of the other side?
A set of exam scores has a mean of 70 and a standard deviation of 10. What is the z-score of a score of 75?
Solve for x in the equation 2x^2 + 5x - 3 = 0.
If the area of a triangle is 24 square cm and its base is 8 cm, what is the height of the triangle?
A company produces x units of a product per hour. If it produces 240 units in 4 hours, how many units does it produce in 2 hours?
Find the value of x in the equation x/4 + 2 = 7.
The mean of a set of numbers is 15 and the median is 10. What is the mode of the set?
Solve the inequality 2x - 5 > 9.
In a survey, 60% of the participants preferred a particular brand of coffee. If 120 people participated in the survey, how many preferred the particular brand?
Solve for y in the equation y - 2 = 11.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a variable in Python?
Which Python data structure is ordered and can store a collection of items?
What is the name of the Python function that prints output to the screen?
What is the purpose of a loop in Python?
options: To repeat a sequence of instructions
questions.correct_answer: To repeat a sequence of instructions

questions.question: What is the data type of a collection of items in Python that are ordered and can be changed?
